title: CHUNNIN 60 Pcs Super Theme Hero Party Plates for Birthday Party Decorations 9in Super Theme Hero Paper Plates Disposable Colorful Paper Plate for Kids Home Birthday Event Supplies
features: Package includes: You'll get 60pcs superhero party paper plates of 9 inches in 6 different designs. Brighten up your table setting with our comic hero paper plates that exude a playful and celebratory atmosphere, ideal for kid’s birthday party and baby shower.

Premium material: All of our superhero party platters are made of quality paper, safe, no smell, heat-resistant, and durable. The premium quality ensures that the superhero plates won't easily bend, break, or let food leak through, providing a reliable and pleasant dining experience.

Supper hero theme design: these hero party plates are designed with 6 different patterns, printed with SUPER, POW, COOL, ZAP, WOW, BOOM. The vibrant colors, vivid illustrations, and attention-grabbing graphics make superhero party plates visually striking, enhancing the overall superhero theme and creating an unforgettable dinning experience.

Save your time: These disposable superhero paper plates decoration can be thrown away after you use them, which can save you from the hassle of dishes-washing. when the party's over, you can spend more time with your family or friends and less time cleaning up.

Wide application: These superhero party plates are suitable for various occasions, such as birthday parties, themed events, comic conventions, baby shower, or movie nights. They can be used as traditional dinner plates or as display pieces for superhero-inspired treats and desserts. Their versatility makes them a must-have for any superhero-themed celebration.
